A mechanic where players burn NFTs to earn rewards like $GK tokens or exclusive digital assets in Block Topia.
Embodies the GraffPUNKS ethos of creation through destruction, echoing street-art rebellion with every sacrificial act.
Often linked to major lore events like the Triple Fork Event, adding narrative depth and stakes to each burned asset.
Represents a high-risk, high-reward strategy, fueling the decentralized fight with the raw energy of loss turned to gain.

Burn-to-earn in the Crypto Moonboys universe is a high-stakes ritual of destruction, where players torch NFTs to claim $GK tokens or rare assets, each burn embodying the GraffPUNKS’ belief that true power rises from the ashes of sacrifice in Block Topia’s volatile wars.

Often linked to seismic events like the Triple Fork Event, burn-to-earn transforms loss into lore, with every incinerated NFT fueling Block Topia’s narrative furnace, sparking new conflicts or empowering factions to rise from digital embers with renewed strength.

This mechanic mirrors the transient danger of street art, where a tag’s brilliance is matched by its risk; in Block Topia, burn-to-earn is a rebel’s wager, a defiant act that can either forge legends or reduce warriors to forgotten ash in the metaverse’s unforgiving crucible.
